nodes.label: Stage File UI Screenshot
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Dragit macOS desktop app demonstrating the stage-file feature. Shows a dark-themed window titled 'Dragit' with a file entry 'main.tsx' from './src' directory, a hand/pointer cursor hovering over it indicating drag interaction, and a 'Staged Changes' section below with count badge showing 0 and placeholder text 'No files with staged changes found.' Illustrates drag-and-drop file staging workflow.
